# XIAO Carrier Board

Use this skill when working on the controller board built around the Seeed Studio XIAO nRF52840 Plus and the Round Display HMI.

## Procedure

1. Read `agent/electronics_control.md`.
2. Read `agent/xiao_nrf52840.md`.
3. Read the references in [design-rules.md](./references/design-rules.md) and [rev1-scope.md](./references/rev1-scope.md).
4. Keep the result schematic-ready and connector-oriented.

## Output

- practical board architecture
- pin and net assignment guidance
- clear rev-1 boundaries
